image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about encoding specificity than social media does.
Context visual: Encoding specificity explains why we remember things better in the same context where we learned them.
Escalation visual: Imagine studying in a coffee shop. You might ace the test there, but struggle in a quiet classroom.
Evidence visual: Research shows that matching the environment during recall enhances memory. It’s not just a coincidence!
Payoff visual: So, next time you study, think about where you are. Your memory might thank you later.
Cta visual: Curious about more mind hacks? Hit follow for the latest science tips!
